title: Acquisition of an additional 48.9% shareholding in Agile Analog Limited by Delin Ventures Limited: notice of final order and variation
body: "The Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster has made a Final Order under the National Security and Investment Act 2021 in respect of the acquisition of an additional 48.9% shareholding in Agile Analog Limited by Delin Ventures Limited.  On 17 December 2024, the Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster made the decision to vary the final order. "
